name: SATA Right Angle 1 to 2 ways 15Pin Sata  Power Supply Extension Cable Male to dual Female SATA SSD Power Port Multiplier
shortName: SATA Right Angle 1 to 2 ways 15Pin Sata  Power Supply Extension Cable
description: A SATA power supply extension cable that splits one 15-pin connector to dual female connectors for SSDs and power devices.
